title: Webhook Security + SSO + Material Change Detector — Full Event Pipeline
description: test_webhook_security.py, test_sso_provider.py, and test_material_change_detector.py cluster together. The material change detector identifies security-relevant git changes (auth, crypto, infra) and computes blast radius, but it does not trigger SSO re-authentication or webhook notifications to security team channels when a material change is detected.
missing: Material change → webhook notification: when a material change is detected in a security-critical file, auto-fire a webhook to the configured Slack/Teams channel with the blast radius summary
SSO session invalidation on critical change: when a material change touches auth/session code, trigger SSO bridge to invalidate all active sessions and force re-authentication
n8n workflow integration: publish material change events to the n8n webhook endpoint so security team can build custom approval workflows in n8n
